title: Pod CLI Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and configurations for managing Pods in Kubernetes.

commands.description: Create a new Pod using a YAML file
commands.scenario: Create a new Pod using a YAML file

commands.description: Get a list of all Pods in the current namespace
commands.scenario: Get a list of all Pods in the current namespace

commands.description: Delete a specific Pod by name
commands.scenario: Delete a specific Pod by name

commands.command:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: my-pod
spec:
  containers:
  - name: my-container
    image: nginx
commands.description: Define a Pod with a single container in YAML
commands.scenario: Define a Pod with a single container in YAML

commands.command:
containers:
- name: my-container
  image: nginx
  env:
  - name: ENV_VAR_NAME
    value: "value"
commands.description: Add environment variables to a Pod's container
commands.scenario: Add environment variables to a Pod's container

commands.command:
containers:
- name: my-container
  image: nginx
  resources:
    limits:
      memory: "128Mi"
      cpu: "500m"
commands.description: Set resource limits for a Pod's container
commands.scenario: Set resource limits for a Pod's container

commands.description: Describe a Pod to get detailed information
commands.scenario: Describe a Pod to get detailed information

commands.description: View logs of a specific Pod
commands.scenario: View logs of a specific Pod

commands.description: Execute a command inside a running Pod
commands.scenario: Execute a command inside a running Pod

commands.description: Scale a Deployment to manage the number of Pods
commands.scenario: Scale a Deployment to manage the number of Pods

commands.description: Patch a Pod to update its configuration
commands.scenario: Patch a Pod to update its configuration

commands.description: Apply a rolling update to a Deployment
commands.scenario: Apply a rolling update to a Deployment
